newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Q1 2026 (net sales -23.1% to SEK479.3M, ARR +11% to SEK383.5M, subscription +13.8%), the OpenAI YubiKey partnership (Apr 30), permanent CEO Jerrod Chong (May 4), and a ~45-person reorg (SEK95M savings) all predate the window.

verdicts.rankRationale: Scaling/identity-for-agentic-workflows lens: no new evidence June 9-23. Q1 (sales -23%, but ARR +11% and OpenAI YubiKey deal), new CEO, and reorg are all pre-window. Subscription/ARR shift is the right direction but already known. Hold rank 16.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Subscription/ARR shift and OpenAI YubiKey channel as agentic auth scales
verdicts.primaryRisk: Hardware sales contraction (-23%) and FX; transition risk under new CEO
verdicts.bull: ARR +11% and the OpenAI ChatGPT YubiKey partnership position Yubico for agentic-identity demand; SEK95M cost-out aids margins.
verdicts.neutral: Recurring lines growing but total sales down 23%; story is a turnaround mid-transition.
verdicts.bear: Sharp top-line decline, currency headwinds and CEO transition; YTD -24% reflects fading hardware demand.
